_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v19 Core build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05152026/v19_plan.txt §3. v19 carries v18p1 floors verbatim because v19 is a reproducibility-first rebuild of the v18.1 / v18.2 recipe (see v19_plan.txt §1.1 for motivation, §1.3 for confirmation that no template-body or row-count changes ship in v19). The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v19 changes ONLY the Stage 5 (Recalibrate) interleave-probs mix at training time (0.25/0.40/0.35 -> 0.33/0.33/0.34). No data-construction recipe changes; row-count gate is therefore unchanged. See v19_plan.txt §2 for the full v18.2 -> v19 delta list.

axes._note: Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18 declared 13000 / floor 11700 over fragmented AB.RMS.{4,5} paraphrases. v18p1 consolidated to single-template AB.RMS.{4,5} Count: 600 each (matches v9_rms / v7); the post-dedup tail lands ~12.2K so the floor is set to 12000.
Carried from v18.1 verbatim. ATE inherits v18 floors (no v18 -> v18p1 change). The AB.ATE.{9,10,11} + JS.ATE.{4,5,6} expansion landed in v18 -- v19 does not touch ATE.

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. AB.VSP.{1..4} and V.CPE.{1..4} capped at Count: 1500 each (matches v10's 4*1500 + 4*1500 = 12K shape that posted VSP 86.7); the post-dedup tail lands ~6K so the floor is set to 5400 (10% headroom).

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18p1 dropped AB.MCQ.EXT.{MITRE,SEC,GLOSS}.1 and reverted to scenario-only AB.MCQ.{1..6} + JS.MCQ.{1,2,5} (matches v8small CKT 77.6 ~6K shape). Three new scenario-shape templates AB.MCQ.7 (mw->ap; Count 800), AB.MCQ.8 (grp->mw; Count 500), AB.MCQ.9 (sub->parent; Count 800) were added in v18p1 to clear the 6000 floor.
